page_content:
AREC869 Advanced Topics in Agricultural and Resource Economics (1-3 Credits)

Frontiers of research in environmental and resource economics; agricultural policy, production, and trade; and development. Topics may include decision making under risk and related market institutions, principal agent analysis, optimal policy design, technology adoption, market structure, land and credit markets, information markets, and income distribution.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
